name: Nike Golf Camp at Berry College -  (July 12–16, 2026)
description: Nike Golf Camp at Berry College returns for another fantastic summer and we invite junior golfers to join Brian Farrer and Evan Spence for a week of top-notch golf instruction! Rome, GA sits just outside of Atlanta and features spectacular accommodations on campus at Berry College. Berry College offers an unusually beautiful environment for learning on its 26,000-acre campus, one of the world's largest. Fields, forests, lakes and mountains provide scenic beauty in a protected natural setting. Nike Golf Camps accommodate all skill levels; the junior player just discovering the game, the high school player trying to move up on the team, and the tournament level junior looking to improve his or her tournament results. All aspects of the game are addressed during the camp; putting, chipping, pitching, full swing, strategy, rules, and etiquette. Campers participate in drills, skills challenges, and other fun games throughout the camp week.

name: Nike Elite Golf Camps in Pebble Beach -  (June 21–25, 2026)
description: THE FLAGSHIP LOCATION FOR NIKE GOLF CAMPS, THIS ONE-OF-A-KIND PROGRAM PROVIDES OUR CAMPERS WITH THE SUMMER TRIP OF A LIFETIME. Join Senior Instructor for Pebble Beach Golf Academy, Kevin Hanssen, and the exceptional staff of teaching professionals for a camp experience you won't forget! Session 1 will be co-directed by Eric Frazzetta, Duan Family Men’s Assistant Golf Coach at Cal Poly, bringing collegiate-level insight and energy to the course. Session 2 features Jon Whithaus, Associate Head Women’s Golf Coach at Duke University and owner/operator of Elite Level Golf, alongside Dan Wesley, Head Coach at the University of Rochester. Overnight Elite Camp Structured for competitive junior golfers ages 12-18, this elite camp presents an exciting, fun-filled learning environment conducted on a rotation of some of the world’s most breathtaking courses: Spyglass Hill® Golf Course, Del Monte™ Golf Course, and The Hay (Pebble Beach's famed short course recently re-designed by Tiger Woods). *Please note: Spanish Bay will be closed for renovation starting in mid-March 2026. Campers now utilize the state-of-the-art practice facilities at Pebble Beach Golf Academy, while receiving instruction from Eric Frazzetta (Session 1), Jon Whithaus and Dan Wesley (Session 2), and the Pebble Beach Academy staff. We have also brought on an amazing female coach to serve on staff for each session. Our female coaches will reside with the girls during camp and provide insightful knowledge into the recruiting process and what it takes to play at the collegiate level. Campers will be housed at the Stevenson School in the Del Monte Forest for the duration of the program! Players will stay in two-person dorm rooms and will be paired with other campers of similar age. Counselors stay in adjacent rooms. Camp sessions run Sunday through Thursday during the summer, but campers are encouraged to sign up for multiple weeks! *Eric Frazzetta will only serve as Camp Director for the June 21-25 session and June 28-July 2 *Jon Whithaus and Dan Wesley will only serve as Camp Directors for the July 12-16 session * If you have questions about whether your child meets the criteria for the Nike Elite Golf Camp, please contact our office at 1-800-645-3226. Parent/Child Camp We also encourage parents to join in on the fun over the weekend! This summer, we will be offering two, very special parent/child experiences! For more information, please see the page for Nike Parent/Child Golf Camps in Pebble Beach. This camp is open to any and all entrants (only limited by age, gender, and number).

name: Nike Golf Camp at University of Illinois -  (June 7–11, 2026)
description: Get ready for an amazing experience in Champaign, IL! Join the Fighting Illini Men’s Golf program for five days of top-notch instruction at the University of Illinois. The Fighting Illini Men’s Golf program has been hosting this premier junior golf camp in Illinois for over a decade and looks forward to another great summer. Nike Golf Camp participants stay on campus in air-conditioned dorms and utilize the exclusive team practice facilities, Lauritsen/Wohlers Outdoor Golf Practice Facility and Demirjian Indoor Golf Facility, for instruction from the coaching staff. Throughout the camp, players travel a short distance to the University’s Orange and Blue Golf Courses, as well Atkins Golf Club, their newly renovated home course where they participate in on-course instruction. This camp location is for boys only.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Peacock Gap Golf Club - Half Day AM Camp (June 8–12, 2026)
description: Get ready for an amazing experience in San Rafael! Join one of our top Nike Camp Directors, Val Verhunce, this summer at Peacock Gap Golf Club. This camp provides top-notch instruction, so come and see why thousands of campers have attended this junior golf program. Improve your game and have fun with our experienced teaching professionals this summer! Summer Full Day Full day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. After morning instruction and a break for lunch, campers will get to apply what they have learned out on the course (course play when available). During course play our professionals teach strategy, etiquette and course management. The Full Day Camp is designed to create complete golfers and raise their game to the next level. Full Day Camps run Monday through Friday from 9:00am - 4:00pm and are open to players of all abilities, ages 10-15. Please note: Lunch is provided for full day campers each day. Summer Half Day 9:00am-12:00pm/1:00pm-4:00pm This program is designed to pique the interest of new golfers while also offering intermediate golfers the instruction needed to improve. Half day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. Campers rotate between stations and participate in drills, skills challenges, and other games. Half Day Camps run Monday through Friday from 9:00am - 12:00pm and 1:00pm - 4:00pm and are open to players of all abilities, ages 5-15. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided for half day campers each day. Nike Camp Skills Challenge The Nike Camp Challenge is an amazing opportunity for your child to put the skills they’ve learned to the test! After participating in one of the full day summer sessions, our camp director will be putting on a Skills Challenge testing the skills of select campers. The top two winners* of the skills challenge will qualify and compete in an on-course tournament that afternoon. The Skills Challenge will be a competitive event with photo opportunities (parents are welcome to attend!) and chances to win special prizes. *Notes: Only campers who are registered for the Summer Full Day sessions and are selected at camp are eligible for the Skills Challenge.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Arcadia Golf Course -  (June 1–5, 2026)
description: Nike Golf Camps is excited to offer an exceptional junior golf experience at Arcadia Par 3 Golf Course in Arcadia, CA. Whether your child is just beginning or building confidence in their fundamentals, come see why thousands of campers have attended this junior golf program. Campers will work to improve all aspects of their game while developing a strong foundation and love for golf that lasts well beyond the summer. Player Focused Instruction Camp Director Joel “Parker” Gorospe leads our team of dedicated teaching professionals. A committed golfer with a single-digit handicap, Parker brings enthusiasm, leadership, and a deep understanding of the game. Parents can trust that instruction is engaging, structured, and tailored to help each player grow both on and off the course.Full Day and Half Day Programs Campers receive three hours of focused daily instruction emphasizing the core fundamentals: putting, chipping, bunker play, and full swing technique. Full Day campers then take their skills onto the course (when available) to apply what they’ve learned in a real playing environment, reinforcing course management and shot execution. Half Day options provide shorter, concentrated instruction ideal for beginners or golfers focused on sharpening fundamentals. Both formats are designed to build confidence, improve technique, and make learning fun for players ages 7–16. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided for campers. Campers can bring their own lunch or purchase lunch at the golf course. This camp is hosted by an outside staff, unrelated to the Arcadia Par 3 instruction team. Jeff Hirose serves as the Camp Coordinator and may only be on-site when available.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Green River Golf Club -  (June 1–5, 2026)
description: Welcome to the Nike Golf Camp in Corona, California! Join Nike Camp Director and Head Golf Professional, AJ Prieto, this year at Green River Golf Club. This camp provides top-notch instruction, so come and see why hundreds of campers have attended this golf program. Improve your game and have fun with our experienced teaching professionals this summer! SUMMER FULL DAY CAMPS This program is a wonderful way for our campers to enjoy a full day of golf. Full day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. After morning instruction and a break for lunch, campers will get to apply what they have learned out on the course. Full Day Camps at Green River are designed to create complete golfers and raise their game to the next level while having fun! Full Day Camps run Monday through Friday from 9:00am - 4:00pm and are open to beginner/intermediate, ages 6-17. Please note: Lunch is provided for full day campers each day. SUMMER HALF DAY CAMPS Camps run Monday through Friday and include fifteen hours of total range instruction. For three hours each day, campers sharpen their skills with our dedicated staff. Strong emphasis is placed on the fundamentals—stance, grip, posture, full swing, rules & etiquette, etc. As the week unfolds, campers receive quality short-game instruction and by Friday, each Nike golfer will see improvement in his or her golf game! Half Day Camps run 9:00am-12:00pm and are open to beginner/intermediate, ages 6-17. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided for half day campers each day. SUMMER ADVANCED CAMPS This program is designed for a golfer who is looking for a more competitive experience focusing on advanced techniques. All aspects of the game are addressed and there is a strong emphasis on tournament preparation, course management, mental toughness and scoring improvement. Advanced Camps run at the same time as the standard half day camp, Monday-Friday. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided for half day campers.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Rio Golf Academy - High Performance Camp -  (June 8–12, 2026)
description: Welcome to the Nike Golf Camps in Orlando, Florida! Join Nike Camp Director, Tom Jackson, and incredible staff from Rio Golf Academy for top-notch instruction at Rio Pinar Golf. Improve your game and have fun with our experienced teaching professionals this summer! HIGH PERFORMANCE CAMP This camp was designed for a high-school, tournament-level golfer looking for a competitive experience. The high performance camp will run from 9:00am-4:00pm, focusing on advanced techniques. The High-Performance Elite Level Training Camp includes assessments, technical instruction, on-course training, 3D Golf Bio-dynamics screening and usage, Trackman technology, an introduction to UpGame, and SAM PuttLab analysis. All aspects of the game are addressed and there is a strong emphasis on tournament preparation, course management, mental toughness and scoring improvement. This camp is open to competitive golfers ages 12-18. Lunch will be provided. If you would like additional information regarding overnight accommodations for this camp, please email golf@ussportscamps.com and we will forward your inquiry directly to the camp director

name: Nike Golf Camp at UC Santa Barbara - Day Camp (July 6–9, 2026)
description: Nike Golf Camps is thrilled to announce the return of its programs at UC Santa Barbara in 2026. Campers have the exciting opportunity to live in the ocean-front dormitories at UCSB while receiving instruction from collegiate coaches and playing amazing courses – including the oceanfront Sandpiper Golf Course and nearby Glen Annie Golf Club. This program is co-ed and open to players of all ability levels, ages 10-17. OVERNIGHT CAMP Our overnight camp at UCSB offers an immersive, on-campus experience in which campers reside in the beautiful Manzanita Village Residence Hall in adjacent rooms to the camp staff while training during the daytime hours. The tuition includes housing, meals, fun evening activities, as well as college recruiting seminars on Tuesday evening (parents are encouraged to attend the seminars!). DAY CAMP (9:00AM – 4:00PM) Nike Golf Camps also offers a summer day camp program for athletes who do not wish to stay overnight. This program runs 9:00am-4:00pm each day and includes daytime training only. Campers can bring their own lunch or purchase on campus. NIKE SPORTS CAMP EXPERIENCE At UC Santa Barbara, Nike Sports Camps offers a unique experience with many sports (Cross Country, Golf, Softball, Swim, Tennis, and Track & Field) operating simultaneously. During the day, the athletes receive sport-specific coaching within their sport focus. In the evening, overnight campers across all sports come together for a special camp-wide experience which includes fun field games, educational seminars, and more. The Nike Golf Camp at University of California Santa Barbara is open to any and all entrants and limited only by number, age and gender. Athletic facilities and coaches are subject to change. The camp is not owned, sponsored, controlled or endorsed by University of California Santa Barbara.

name: Nike Elite Golf Camp with CU Boulder Men’s Golf -  (June 16–18, 2026)
description: CU Boulder's Men's Golf and Nike Golf Camps are excited to return for another summer of top-notch instruction. The Nike Elite Golf Camps with CU Boulder are directed by Head Coach for CU Boulder Men's Golf, Roy Edwards, and is supported by his staff of assistants and player coaches. Elite Camp The Elite Camp is specifically designed for the tournament golfer who wishes to play college golf and improve their tournament results. It is open to all skill levels of young men and women, ages 12-18, but the curriculum is geared towards players who are playing competitively. The camp recreates the practice and qualifying regimens the CU men's team uses on a daily basis. Specifically, the camp teaches the practice habits of championship golfers, fitness, mental strength, college preparation, time management, course management, academics and team camaraderie. Each player is also provided video analysis to bring home with them via Trackman. For the duration of the week, campers and staff reside at the Courtyard by Marriott North Denver/Westminister, located just minutes from CU's home course, Colorado National Golf Club. Campers have the privilege of using the same beautiful practice facilities the team uses at Colorado National, and engage in daily course play.

name: Nike Golf Camp at the University of Denver - Day Camp (June 22–25, 2026)
description: Nike Golf Camps is thrilled to return to University of Denver in Summer 2026! Campers have the unique opportunity to live on campus at DU (in adjacent rooms to the camp staff) while receiving daily instruction from collegiate coaches at local golf facilities. Open to players of all ability levels, ages 10-17, this camp provides junior golfers the chance to experience the life of a college golfer while making lifelong friends and memories. Overnight Camp The overnight camp at University of Denver offers an immersive, on-campus experience where campers reside in the beautiful DU dormitories in adjacent rooms to the coaching staff while training during the daytime hours. The tuition includes greens fees, housing, meals, fun evening activities, as well as college recruiting seminars on Tuesday evening (parents are encouraged to attend the seminars!). Day Camp (9:00am-4:00pm) Nike Golf Camps also offers a summer day camp program for athletes who do not wish to stay overnight. This program runs 9:00am-4:00pm each day and includes daytime training only. Campers can bring their own lunch or purchase on campus. NIKE SPORTS CAMP EXPERIENCE At University of Denver, Nike Sports Camps offers a unique experience with many sports (Baseball, Cross Country, Football, Golf, Softball, and Tennis) operating simultaneously. During the day, the athletes receive sport-specific coaching within their sport focus. In the evening, overnight campers across all sports come together for a special camp-wide experience which includes fun field games, educational seminars, and more. GOLF FACILITIES/TRANSPORTATION INFORMATION The camp plans to utilize Overland Golf Course (Session 1 – June 22-25) and Kennedy Golf Course (Session 2 – June 29-July 2) as its training facilities. Campers and staff are transported to/from the golf courses for training each day. The Nike Golf Camp at University of Denver is open to any and all entrants and limited only by number, age and gender. Athletic facilities and coaches are subject to change. Campers will be provided on-course instruction each day. However, a certain number of holes is not guaranteed and are subject to weather delays/cancellation. The camp is not owned, sponsored, controlled or endorsed by University of Denver.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Rollins College -  (July 12–16, 2026)
description: Rollins College is located just minutes outside of Orlando in Winter Park, FL. The Princeton Review named Rollins among the Top 50 "Best Value" private colleges nationally. Campers are housed on campus at Rollins in dormitory-style housing and the staff lives in the dorms to provide nightly supervision. Instruction and daily play will take place at Rio Pinar Country Club, while evenings feature fun activities and TrackMan simulator sessions in the NEW on-campus Tennis & Golf CenterOther teaching professionals and current college players assist Coach Frakes throughout the camp week.

name: Nike Golf Camp at University of Maryland -  (June 21–24, 2026)
description: Get ready for an amazing experience in College Park, MD! Our golf camp at University of Maryland takes place just outside Washington D.C. Junior golfers, ages 10 - 18, of all ability levels are welcome to join for an unforgettable camp experience! The University of Maryland coaching staff has been hosting this camp for many years and they are excited to improve the skills of each young golfer. OVERNIGHT CAMP This overnight camp includes golf instruction from Division I coaches, overnight stay, course play, meals and fun, supervised evening activities. Players will stay on campus at UMD and travel to University of Maryland Golf Course and Paint Branch Golf Course for daily instruction and course play with the staff. By the end of the week, each player should expect to see substantial improvement to their game. Advanced/Elite Players For competitive junior golfers looking for local day camps, University of Maryland offers programs for elite players at the following location: Nike Elite Golf Camps, University of Maryland.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Drew University -  (July 5–8, 2026)
description: Get ready for an amazing experience in Madison, NJ at Drew University! Junior golfers, ages 10-18, are welcome to join for an unforgettable camp experience! Ryan Williams, Head Women’s Golf Coach at Central Michigan University, Liz Fernandez, Head Women’s Golf Coach at Emory University, and the dedicated coaching staff are thrilled to offer two weeks of a junior overnight golf camp at Drew University. Structured for players of all ability levels, camp participants enjoy this four day experience working to improve all facets of their golf game. *Please note: This camp was formerly held at St. Elizabeth and is now hosted at Drew University. OVERNIGHT CAMP Nike Golf Camps at Drew University offers two sessions of a comprehensive three-night, four-day overnight (Session I: Sunday-Wednesday; Session II: Thursday-Sunday) experience for players of all skill levels. This camp includes instruction from Division I & III coaches, overnight stay, course play, and meals. Each day of camp consists of work in three primary areas: driving/full swing, short-game (chipping, pitching and bunker play) and putting. Players will stay on campus at Drew University and will travel to Fox Hollow Golf Club each day for daily instruction and course play. FULL DAY CAMP Local residents have the option of participating in the day camp which runs from 9:00am - 4:00pm, (Session I: Sunday-Wednesday; Session II: Thursday-Sunday). This option includes all golf instruction, lunch, and course play. Day campers will need to be dropped off and picked up at the Fox Hollow Golf Club each day. Details on the first and last days of camp will be included in the Nike Camp information packet. Please note: If you are unable to drop off/pick up your child each day at Fox Hollow Golf Club due to distance, we are more than happy to provide transportation to and from Drew University for $40 per day ($160 for the week). IF PARENTS ARE LATE PICKING UP, THEY HAVE TO COME PICK UP ON CAMPUS.

name: St Andrews Golf Camp - Parent/Child Camps -  (Aug. 1–6, 2026)
description: You and your child will improve your game and create memories that last a lifetime on this amazing golf getaway at St Andrews, The Home of Golf! Open to players of all ability levels, this program provides each participant with 8 total hours of instruction from certified PGA professionals at the 5-star St Andrews Golf Links Academy. New this year, short game instruction is led in part by Dan Grieve, a highly esteemed Head PGA Professional, PGA Master Coach, and one of UK's Top 50 Coaches. Participants will also enjoy four rounds of golf across St Andrews Links courses and other iconic venues. One of these rounds features a fun Parent/Child tournament, complete with an overall prize for the winning team. The camp also offers a leisure day in the middle of camp to give parents and juniors a day of rest. This day includes a historical walking tour of the town of St Andrews. This 5-night camp tuition covers both the parent AND junior. Tuition includes accommodations at the 5* Old Course Hotel or 5* Fairmont St Andrews, luxury rides to and from the airport, all golf fees, transportation to all pre-booked golf courses, a full Scottish breakfast each morning, lunch at Fairmont for one day, and dinner for one evening at the Niblick Restaurant - portion of the golf museum where The Claret Jug will be present. St Andrews Golf Travel's Marc, Jamie or Graeme will serve as your personal guide throughout the trip. *Please note lunch and dinner will only be provided for one day/evening. *If you would like to book separate accommodations, add more guests/family members than 2, or book an extended stay in St Andrews, please call us at 1-800-645-3226.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Sam Houston State University -  (June 8–12, 2026)
description: Get ready for an amazing experience in Huntsville, TX! Sam Houston State set to offer junior golf camps for another summer of instruction and fun. Get better this summer under the direction of college coaches and players, led by Head Coach, Brandt Kieschnick. OVERNIGHT CAMP The overnight camp includes all golf instruction, course play, meals, housing, and evening activities. Campers are housed in the Piney Woods Dorm on campus and eat meals in the dining halls each day. Following dinner each night, campers participate in evening activities that can include campus tours, movies, and other sports activities. DAY CAMP Local residents have the option of participating in the day camp which runs from 9:00am - 4:00pm. This option includes all golf instruction, lunch, and course play. Day campers are dropped off and picked up at the course each day.

name: Nike Advanced Golf Camp at Park City -  (June 14–18, 2026)
description: The newly renovated Homestead Resort will return to host our advanced golf camp just south of Park City, UT. This golf-intensive program is open to competitive boys and girls, ages 12 - 18, looking to take their game to new heights. Led by Head Men's Golf Coach at University of Rochester, Dan Wesley offers competitive junior golfers a unique opportunity to play some of the best golf courses in America, greatly improve their skills and learn valuable lessons about tournament and college golf. Mornings are spent in small group and individual instruction, with an emphasis on fine-tuning existing swings and developing more consistency. Course play takes place each afternoon where instruction continues under real playing conditions. Participants enjoy beautiful accommodations at Homestead Resort, just outside of Park City, UT. For course play, campers enjoy Soldier Hollow GC and a rotation of other Park City golf courses to experience play in multiple settings. Our camp utilizes Soldier Hollow GC for majority of morning instructional sessions. This program is suitable for intermediate and advanced golfers looking for a competitive camp experience.

name: Nike Golf Camp at The College of William & Mary -  (June 14–18, 2026)
description: Nike Golf Camps return to Williamsburg, Virginia at one of the most historic and respected academic institutions in the country. Our experienced coaching staff is eager to help junior golfers improve their game this summer. Nike Camp Director and Washington and Lee University Women's Head Coach, Jane Hopkinson-Wood, looks forward to helping junior golfers of all abilities realize their full potential by providing a fun-filled week of instruction and course play at Kiskiack Golf Club. We are committed to helping each camper become a better player, and we hope all our participants leave camp having established new friendships and more passion for the game! This camp is open to any and all entrants (must meet age requirements). This camp is not owned, sponsored, or affiliated in any way with College of William & Mary. We utilize William & Mary for housing and meals only, and travel off-campus for daily instruction and course play.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Seattle University -  (Aug. 9–12, 2026)
description: Get ready for an amazing experience in Seattle, WA! Head Coach and long-time Nike Camp Director, Marc Chandonnet, offers a week-long junior overnight camp at Seattle University. Structured for players of all ability levels, camp participants enjoy this four day experience working to improve all facets of their golf game. Each day of camp consists of work in three primary areas: driving/full swing, short-game (chipping, pitching and bunker play) and putting. Daily instruction takes place at multiple courses in the Seattle area. Other instructional topics include; course management, strategy, and rules and etiquette. Campers have the privilege of staying in dorms on the beautiful Seattle University campus. This camp is open to ages 10-18.

name: Nike Elite Golf Camp at University of Maryland -  (Aug. 2–3, 2026)
description: Welcome to the Nike Elite Golf Camp in College Park, MD! Our elite junior golf camp at University of Maryland is geared towards players interested in playing college golf and aims to improve each campers game in a Division I golf environment. Elite golfers, ages 12 - 17 are welcome to join for an unforgettable camp experience! TWO-DAY ELITE CAMP This unique camp is focused on giving players the opportunity to work directly with the University of Maryland coaching staff on all aspects of their game and provide insights to help prepare them for college golf. This camp will include GC Quad launch monitor readouts, SAM Putt lab, introduction to the Aimpoint green reading system and the DECADE course management strategy.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Lake Geneva -  (July 19–22, 2026)
description: Enjoy beautiful summer weather and fantastic golf instruction at Nike Golf Camp at Lake Geneva, Wisconsin. Associate Head Women’s Golf Coach at Duke University, Jon Whithaus, and Head Men’s Golf Coach at University of Rochester, Dan Wesley, are looking forward to improving your golf game. During the week, campers will have the opportunity to enjoy beautiful accommodations at Lake Lawn Resort. Daily range instruction takes place in the mornings followed by course play in the afternoons under the supervision and direction of our camp staff. In addition to Lake Lawn's Majestic Oaks Golf Course, campers will travel to and from Oak Grove Golf Course in Harvard, IL.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Fieldstone Golf Club - Full Day Camp (June 15–19, 2026)
description: Welcome to the Nike Golf Camp in Auburn Hills, Michigan! Join Nike Camp Director, Chip Hierlihy, this summer at Fieldstone Golf Club. This camp provides top-notch instruction, so come and see why hundreds of campers have attended this junior golf program. Improve your game and have fun with our experienced teaching professionals this summer! FULL DAY CAMPS This program is a wonderful way for our campers to enjoy a full day of golf. Full day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. After morning instruction and a break for lunch, campers will get to apply what they have learned out on the course (course play when available). Full Day Camps run Monday through Friday from 9:00am to 3:00pm and are open to players of all abilities, ages 10-16. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided for full day campers each day. HALF DAY CAMPS This program is designed to pique the interest of new golfers while also offering intermediate golfers the instruction needed to improve. Half day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. Half Day Camps run Monday through Friday 12:00pm to 3:00pm and are open to beginner/players of all abilities, ages 6-13. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided for half day campers each day. *These camps are open to any and all entrants and are limited only by age, gender and number.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Tilden Park Golf Course - Half Day PM Camp (June 1–4, 2026)
description: Get ready for an amazing experience in Berkeley, CA! Join one of our top Nike Camp Directors, Trish Hinze, this summer at Tilden Park Golf Course. This camp provides top-notch instruction, so come and see why thousands of campers have attended this junior golf program. Improve your game and have fun with our experienced teaching professionals this summer! Full Day Camp This program is a wonderful way for our campers to enjoy a full day of golf. Full day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. After morning instruction and a break for lunch, campers will get to apply what they have learned out on the course. Full Day Camps run Monday through Friday from 9:00am to 4:00pm and are open to players of all abilities, ages 9-15. Please note: Lunch is provided for full day campers each day. Half day campers receive four hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. Half Day Camps run Monday through Thursday from 1:00pm to 5:00pm and are open to beginner/intermediate players, ages 7-12. Please note: Lunch and course play is NOT provided for half day campers. *If you have any questions regarding the number of campers and/or the breakdown of a specific camp week, please call us at 1(800) 645-3226 from Monday – Friday, 8:00am – 5:00pm PST.

description: Welcome to the Nike Golf Camp in San Diego, California! Join Nike Camp Director, Todd Steller, this summer at Riverwalk Golf Club. name: Nike Golf Camp at Dairy Creek Golf Course - Half Day Camp (June 22–25, 2026)
description: Welcome to the Nike Golf Camp at Dairy Creek Golf Course in San Luis Obispo, California! Join the Dairy Creek Golf staff this summer for an exciting and immersive golf experience. description: Welcome to the Nike Elite Golf Camp in San Luis Obispo, California! name: Nike Golf Camp with Emory University at Smoke Rise Country Club -  (June 8–12, 2026)
description: Join Emory University Head Women’s Golf Coach and 2025 Division III WGCA Coach of the Year, Liz Fernandes, this summer at Smoke Rise Country Club. From beginners learning fundamentals to advanced juniors fine-tuning their competitive edge, each camper receives top-notch instruction to improve your game and have fun with our experienced teaching professionals this summer! CHAMPIONSHIP INSTRUCTION Parents can feel confident knowing their child is learning from some of the most qualified coaches in the collegiate landscape. From championship mindset to playing at the highest level, the Emory coaching staff and players teach the practice habits of championship golfers, fitness, mental strength, college preparation, time management, and course management. CAMPUS VISITATION The first day of camp meets at Emory University for a unique campus tour with the coaches and players. Each camper will experience campus life as an Emory Eagle, an inside peak into a “Day in the Life” as a college golfer and learn more about the golf experience on campus. The first day will not include any golf instruction. DAILY INSTRUCTION & COURSE PLAY The camp combines high-level instruction with real on-course application to help campers develop complete, game-ready skills. Campers will learn the core fundamentals of the full swing, short game, and putting, while also being introduced to the same practice routines, training habits, and performance-focused drills used by the Emory Eagles golf program. From Tuesday through Friday, campers will take their development to the course, playing alongside camp staff who provide coaching in real time—covering course management, shot selection, pre-shot routine, and how to score under pressure. Please note: Monday drop-off and check-in will occur on the Emory University campus. Tuesday – Friday will take place at the Smoke Rise Country Club.

name: Nike Golf Camp with Cardinal Creek Golf Course at Scott Air Force Base -  (July 27–31, 2026)
description: Welcome to the Nike Golf Camp with DP Golf at Cardinal Creek Golf Course at Scott Air Force Base! Join Nike Camp Director, Dan Polites, PGA Author-PGA Award Winner and Hall of Fame Coach! This camp provides top-notch instruction by our highly qualified staff of teaching professionals. Improve your game and have fun with our experienced teaching professionals this summer! HALF DAY CAMPS This program is designed to pique the interest of new golfers while also offering intermediate golfers the instruction needed to improve. Half day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. Campers will also have access to the Cardinal Creek Championship Golf Course. Additionally, aircraft flying in and out of Scott Air Force Base add a unique and exciting element to the camp experience. Half Day Camps run Monday through Friday from 9:00am - 12:00pm and are open to players of all abilities, ages 7-17. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided but there will be food and beverages available for purchase. Cardinal Creek has a full service restaurant.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Stonehill College -  (July 26–30, 2026)
description: We’re thrilled to announce the overnight camp at Stonehill College in Easton, MA. Join the Beast ‘Em Staff for an incredible summer on campus. This camp provides players of all ability levels, ages 12-18, Division I instruction, exposure to campus life, and fun, encouraging atmosphere to improve your game. On-Campus Life Campers will experience an authentic taste of college life while staying in the Stonehill College residence halls throughout the week. Each day includes a full schedule of golf, meals, and evening activities designed to build friendships and create a fun, team-like environment. With access to campus dining, common areas, and the vibrant Stonehill College atmosphere, campers will enjoy a true overnight college camp experience while developing independence, confidence, and lasting memories both on and off the course. Daily Instruction and Course Play The camp combines daily instruction with real on-course play at a rotation of courses nearby. Campers will learn the core fundamentals of the full swing, short game, and putting. From Sunday through Thursday, campers will receive a welcoming 9-hole round and take their development to the course for the duration of the week, playing alongside camp staff who provide coaching in real time. Full Day Camp For any players who do not wish to stay overnight, we also offer a limited number of day camp spaces. The Full Day camp includes instruction, on-course play, and lunch. Full Day campers will check-in/check-out on campus on the first and last day. During the week, full day campers will be dropped off at the course, ready for instruction. This camp is open to boys and girls, ages 12-18, and runs approximately from 9:00am-3:00pm each day. (Please note: Sunday and Thursday will have different arrival and departure times due to check-in/check-out). This camp/clinic is not owned, operated, or otherwise controlled by Stonehill College. This camp is open to any and all entrants and is only limited by age, gender, and number.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Foundation Golf Center -  (July 27–29, 2026)
description: Welcome to the Nike Golf Camp at Foundation Golf Center in Coldwater, MI. Join the Nike Camp Director, PGA Golf Professional Ryan Leitner, this summer at Foundation Golf Center. This camp will provide top-notch instruction designed to learn the basics of the game and most importantly have fun. The juniors will also learn proper etiquette and rules of the game. HALF DAY CAMPS This program is designed to help beginners and intermediate golfers improve on basic fundamentals of the game. Half day campers receive three hours of instruction each day working on putting, chipping, and full swing. The half day camps run Monday thru Wednesday 10:00am – 1:00pm and are open to beginners and players of all abilities (ages 8-14). Please note: Lunch is NOT provided for half day campers each day.

name: Nike Golf Camp at A-Ga-Ming Golf Resort -  (June 21–24, 2026)
description: Get ready for an incredible golf experience in Northern Michigan! The Nike Golf Camp at A-Ga-Ming Golf Resort offers junior golfers, ages 10-17, the opportunity to learn and play on world-class courses. Led by Central Michigan University’s Head Women’s Golf Coach, Ryan Williams, this camp provides top-tier instruction in a breathtaking setting. Whether you're looking to sharpen your skills or take your game to the next level, this four-day camp promises an unforgettable experience! OVERNIGHT CAMP Nike Golf Camps at A-Ga-Ming Golf Resort offers a three-night, four-day overnight camp experience for players of all skill levels. This camp includes instruction from Division I coaches, overnight stay, course play, and meals. Each day of camp consists of work in three primary areas: driving/full swing, short-game (chipping, pitching and bunker play) and putting. Players will be housed in the Maplewood Condos and receive daily instruction and course play on the Sundance course and Torch course. DAY CAMP (9:00am-4:00pm) This program also offers a day camp option for players who do not wish to stay overnight. The day camp runs 9:00am-4:00pm daily and includes instruction and course play only. Day campers must bring their own lunch. This camp is open to any and all entrants (limited only by number, age, grade level, and/or gender).

name: Nike Golf Camp at the University of Minnesota -  (Aug. 20–22, 2026)
description: University of Minnesota is pleased to offer summer camps for players of all abilities, ages 8-17, looking to take their game to the next level. Join Associate Head Women's Golf Coach, Miranda Greene and Assistant Men’s Golf Coach, Cameron McCloskey for this unique Division I golf camp experience in Minneapolis. 3-DAY CLINIC This program includes instruction from Division I coaches, course play and a curriculum structured for players all abilities. Each day of camp consists of work on and off the course in three primary areas: driving/full swing, short game (chipping, pitching and bunker play) and putting. Day 1: Afternoon 9-hole on course assessment at Rush Creek Golf CourseDay 2: Morning Instructional session at the John W. Mooty Golf FacilityDay 3: Afternoon18-hole on course instruction at Rush Creek Golf Course If you're interested in attending any of our other UofM golf camps, please see the links below: Half Day Camp: Nike Golf Camps, University of Minnesota Half Day This camp is open to any and all entrants (limited only by number, age, grade level, and/or gender).

name: Nike Golf Camp at St. Louis Golf Lessons -  (June 8–11, 2026)
description: Welcome to the Nike Golf Camp in St. Louis, Missouri! Join Nike Camp Directors, Maria Palozola and Bill Sevier, this summer at Tower Tee Golf & Recreation (June 16-19) and Steven J. Bander Driving Range (July 14-17 & August 4-7). This camp provides top-notch instruction by our highly qualified staff of teaching professionals. Improve your game and have fun with our experienced teaching professionals this summer! HALF DAY CAMPS This program is designed to pique the interest of new golfers while also offering intermediate golfers the instruction needed to improve. Half day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. Half Day Camps run Monday through Thursday from 9:00am - 12:00pm and are open to players of all abilities, ages 7-14. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Bridger Creek Golf Course -  (July 6–10, 2026)
address: Bridger Creek Golf Course2710 McIlhattan Rd
description: Golfers of all skill levels are welcome to Nike Golf Camps at Bridger Creek Golf Course this summer, located at the foot of the Bridger Mountains in the tranquil setting of Bozeman, Montana. Full Day Camps This program is a wonderful way for our campers to enjoy a full day of golf. Full day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. After morning instruction and a break for lunch, campers will get to apply what they have learned out on the course. Full Day Camps run Monday through Friday from 9:00am-4:00pm and are open to players of all abilities, ages 12-18. Please note: Lunch is provided for full day campers each day. Half Day Camps Half Day campers receive three hours of instruction each day on all different aspects of the game, including putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. From beginning players to advanced, these are great camps for anyone who wants to improve. Bridger Creek offers Half Day camps in the morning from 8:00-11:00am, for ages 6-10, and in the afternoons from 12:00-3:00pm, for ages 11-16. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided for half day campers each day.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Eagle Hills Golf Course - Half Day Camp (June 1–4, 2026)
description: Register now for golf camps in Omaha at Eagle Hills Golf Course. Learn, practice, and improve in a fun, positive environment that builds both athletic and mental skills along with the ability to transfer those skills to the golf course. Jonathan Mielke, Director of Instruction has designed programs to help junior golfers improve, regardless of skill level or experience. FULL DAY CAMP These camps are an excellent opportunity for junior golfers to improve their skills and their course management at the same time. Students in the full day camp enjoy three hours of instruction each morning and work on all facets of the game and prepares the junior player for the challenges of the course. After lunch, it’s off to the first tee for course play! Please note: Lunch is provided for full day campers each day. HALF DAY CAMP This program offers campers of all abilities the opportunity to work on and improve every part of their game. Half Day campers receive three hours of instruction each day on all different aspects of the game including putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. Along with on-course time on the Academy Course. Juniors will get real-time on-course coaching to help them transfer their skills from the range to the golf course. From beginning players to advanced, these are great camps for anyone who wants to have fun and improve. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided for half day campers. *For a visual of what a "Day at Camp" looks like, please click the "watch video" link in the photo gallery.

name: Nike Golf Camp at The Lawrenceville School -  (June 28–July 2, 2026)
description: Nike Golf Camps return to Lawrenceville, New Jersey this summer, hosted at the renowned campus of The Lawrenceville School! Led by Men's Head Golf Coach at University of Rochester, Dan Wesley, junior golfers will experience collegiate level coaching, world-class facilities and an outstanding golf curriculum designed to improve every aspect of the game. HISTORIC FACILITIES Across The Lawrenceville School's 800-acre campus, campers will reside in air-conditioned residence halls, with rooms located near camp staff for supervision and support. With access to campus dining, common areas, and the historic "Big Red" atmosphere, campers will enjoy a true overnight camp experience while developing independence, confidence, and lasting memories both on and off the course. DAILY INSTRUCTION & COURSE PLAY The camp combines high-level instruction from Division III coaches with real on-course application at Springfield Golf Center. Campers will learn the core fundamentals of full swing, short game, and putting, while also being introduced to the same practice routines, training habits, and performance-focused drills used by collegiate programs nationwide. Each afternoon, campers will take their their development to the course, playing alongside camp staff who provide coaching in real time—covering course management, shot selection, pre-shot routine, and how to score under pressure.WELCOME ROUND Camp will kick off with a 9-hole welcome round at The Lawrenceville School Golf Course, followed by dinner and evening activities. Please come prepared for golf on the first day of camp! FULL DAY CAMP Local residents have the option of participating in the day camp which runs from 8:30am - 4:30pm. This option includes all golf instruction, lunch, and course play. Day campers will need to be dropped off and picked up at The Lawrenceville School each day. Camps are open to any and all entrants (limited only by number and age, grade level, and/or gender).

name: Nike Golf Camp at Scally’s Golf Center -  (Aug. 3–7, 2026)
address: Scally's Golf Center265 Hookstown Grade Road
description: Come enjoy golf camp in Pittsburgh, PA and experience one of the "Top 50 Ranges" in the United States. Scally’s Golf Center, complete with an outstanding practice facility, is an ideal location for camp and our staff is poised for another great summer. HALF DAY CAMPS This program is designed to pique the interest of new golfers while also offering intermediate golfers the instruction needed to improve. Half day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. For three hours each day, campers sharpen their skills with the Learning Center staff, made up of experienced teaching professionals. Half Day Camps run Monday through Friday from 9:00am - 12:00pm and are open to players of all abilities, ages 9-16. As the week unfolds, campers receive quality short-game instruction and by Friday, each Nike golfer will see improvement in his or her golf game! Please note: Lunch provided on the last day of camp.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Skippack Golf Club - Half Day Camp (July 6–10, 2026)
address: Skippack Golf Club1146 Stump Hall Road
description: Welcome to the Nike Golf Camp in Skippack, Pennsylvania! Join Camp Director and PGA Professional, Darryl Lock, and his staff of dedicated instructors for the ultimate camp experience and get better this summer! More than 1000 different campers have gone through the program at Skippack, known for being the nation's most popular Nike Camp. In addition to a high percentage of return campers, Skippack’s camps have one of the highest number of campers in the Nike Golf Camp network, while still maintaining a low student to instructor ratio. Darryl and Tim always emphasize that their students should have fun playing this great game while giving them the skills and knowledge to improve their play. FULL DAY CAMPS This program is a wonderful way for our campers to enjoy a full day of golf. Full day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. After morning instruction and a break for lunch, campers will get to apply what they have learned out on the course (course play when available). Full Day Camps run Monday through Thursday from 9:00am - 4:00pm (Friday: 9:00am - 12:00pm) and are open to players of all abilities, ages 9-17. Please note: Lunch is provided for full day campers each day. HALF DAY CAMPS This program is designed to pique the interest of new golfers while also offering intermediate golfers the instruction needed to improve. Half day campers receive three hours of instruction each day with emphasis on putting, chipping, bunker play and full swing. Half Day Camps run Monday through Friday from 9:00am - 12:00pm and are open to players of all abilities, ages 7-13. Please note: Lunch is NOT provided for half day campers each day. HIGH SCHOOL SESSION This program is designed for high school players who are entering or playing at a high school level, ages 12-17. The High School Session offers both Full Day and Half Day camp options. Full Day Camp runs Monday through Thursday from 9:00am - 4:00pm (Friday: 9:00am - 12:00pm) and Half Day Camp runs Monday through Friday from 9:00am - 12:00pm. Please note: Lunch is provided for full day campers each day.

name: Nike Golf Camp at Hampden-Sydney College -  (July 18–21, 2026)
description: Join us at Hampden-Sydney College for an incredible summer on campus with Head Golf Coach, Duncan Wheeler. This camp provides players of all ability levels, ages 12-18, Division III instruction, exposure to campus life, and a fun, encouraging atmosphere to improve your game. ON-CAMPUS LIFE Campers will experience an authentic taste of college life while staying in Hampden-Sydney College residence halls throughout the week, with rooms located near camp staff for supervision and support. Each day includes a full schedule of golf, meals, and evening activities designed to build friendships and create a fun, team-like environment. With access to campus dining, common areas, and a student-athlete atmosphere, campers will enjoy a true overnight college camp experience while developing independence, confidence, and lasting memories both on and off the course. DAILY INSTRUCTION & COURSE PLAY The camp combines DIII instruction with real on-course application at The Manor Golf Club. Campers will learn the core fundamentals of the full swing, short game, and putting, while also being introduced to the same practice routines, training habits, and performance-focused drills used by the Tigers golf program. From Saturday - Tuesday, campers will take their development to the course, playing alongside camp staff who provide coaching in real time—covering course management, shot selection, pre-shot routine, and how to score under pressure. EXTENDED DAY For any players who do not wish to stay overnight, we also offer a limited number of day camp spaces. The Extended Day camp includes instruction, on-course play, evening activities, lunch and dinner. Extended Day campers will be dropped off and picked up at the campus each day. This camp is open to boys, ages 12-18, and runs approximately 8:00am - 8:00pm each day. (Please note: Saturday and Tuesday will have different arrival and departure times due to check-in/check-out). This camp/clinic is not owned, operated, or otherwise controlled by Hampden-Sydney College. This camp is open to any and all entrants and is only limited by age, gender, and number.

name: Nike Elite Golf Camp at Sam Houston State University -  (July 15–16, 2026)
description: Nike Elite Golf Camps is excited to offer the Elite Camp program at Sam Houston State University! Hosted by SHSU's Head Golf Coach, Brandt Kieschnick, this program recreates the practice regimens of a highly competitive collegiate golf team and aims to improve each campers game in a Division I golf environment. ELITE CLINIC The Two-Day Elite Clinic is designed for the golfer who desires to play at the collegiate level and develop their game. It is open to all skill levels and geared towards players who are playing competitively or wanting to play competitively! This camp offers a “Division 1 College Golf” simulated team practice and each camper will learn how to train like a Division I Golfer to help better their scores on the course! This camp is open to any and all entrants (only limited by age, gender, and number).
